title: mapania squamata
intro: Mapania squamata is a species of aquatic plant, also known as the 'leather fern', that is native to tropical Asia and Australia. The Mapania squamata plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting infections, which can be attributed to its bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
